visual_description: The audio opens with a burst of high-energy, celebratory music, featuring a driving beat and a festive, percussive melody that creates a lively and exciting atmosphere. A man in a dark suit stands in the center of the frame, smiling warmly. The setting is a dimly lit, traditional-looking space, possibly a temple or a festive hall. The background is richly decorated with numerous red paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling, casting a warm, reddish glow. In the foreground, there are tables laden with offerings, including what appear to be piles of white, round pastries and other decorative items. The camera is at a medium distance, capturing the man from the waist up. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera zooms in slightly on the man in the suit as he continues to smile and speak. The background remains the same, with the red lanterns and the decorated tables creating a vibrant, celebratory atmosphere. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right.
